name: io.github.andreisirbu91-lab/mcpspend
description: Query your MCPSpend usage from any MCP client. Per-tool cost attribution, top tools by spend, recent sessions, month-to-date usage projections. Pairs with the MCPSpend observability proxy that records every MCP tool call your agents make.

environmentVariables.name: MCPSPEND_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your MCPSpend API key. Create one at https://mcpspend.com/dashboard/keys. Starts with mcps_live_ or mcps_test_.

environmentVariables.name: MCPSPEND_ENDPOINT
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Override the MCPSpend API endpoint. Defaults to https://api.mcpspend.com. Use only if you self-host MCPSpend.
